name: Coconut-Graham Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread coconut evenly in a 9-inch microwave-safe pie plate. Microwave on high for 1 minute. Stir, then microwave for 4 to 7 minutes longer, stirring every 30 seconds until the coconut is golden brown. Transfer to a plate to cool.
2. Wash, dry and lightly grease the pie plate.
3. Microwave butter in a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl on high for 1 minute or until melted. Stir in cracker crumbs, coconut, and sugar until evenly moistened. Press evenly over bottom and up sides of pie plate.
4. Place pie plate on an inverted microwave-safe saucer. Microwave on high for 2 to 3 minutes, rotating the pie plate half a turn after 1 minute, until the bottom of the crust is drier and springs back when pressed gently.
5. Let stand on flat surface for 10 minutes. The crust will become firm on standing.
